name: web_scraper
description: Advanced web scraping tool. Extracts all content from webpages (static and dynamic), downloads images, parses text, understands page structure, summarizes content, and manages output directories. Handles errors gracefully across diverse website types.

url.description: Target URL (required for scrape, extract, analyze, summarize, find_feeds, parse_feed actions)

output_dir.description: Directory to store scraped content (default: workspace/scrape_TIMESTAMP)

wait_for_js.description: Wait for JavaScript to render (increases time but handles dynamic content). Default: true

wait_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for JS rendering. Default: 10

download_images.description: Download all images found on page. Default: true

max_images.description: Maximum number of images to download. Default: 50

extract_tables.description: Extract tables as structured data. Default: true

include_metadata.description: Include page metadata (title, author, description, etc.). Default: true

clean_text.description: Remove boilerplate, navigation, ads. Default: true

summarize.description: Generate text summary of main content. Default: true

max_results.description: Maximum number of search results to return. Default: 10

max_entries.description: Maximum number of feed entries to return. Default: 20

output.description: Optional file path to write result JSON
